calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defendant
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Veronica Zermeno, 650-355-6428, plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona with daughter, Jacqueline Zermeno acting as interpreter.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT A R G U E D DUE TO LACK OF NOTIFICATION BY OPPOSING PARTY ON THE OTHER SIDE OF HER INTENT TO ARGUE. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT MIGUEL AGUILAR'S Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defendant GRANTED; no opposition filed. THE COURT WILL PREPARE THE ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: SARA LERSCHEN CSR# 6213. (301/JLW)
